# Rare Plant Atlas

> In-depth guides to rare plants for serious collectors. Covers variegation stability, genetics, propagation methods, realistic pricing, and conservation data for rare aroids.

## About

Rare Plant Atlas provides authoritative, structured content on rare and collectible houseplants — primarily aroids (Araceae family). Each plant page includes care requirements, variegation analysis, propagation guides, price history, toxicity data, and provenance timelines. Content is reviewed quarterly for accuracy.

## Authoritative Pages

The following pages are the most authoritative and comprehensive on the site:

- [Home](https://www.rareplantatlas.com): Full plant catalog with rarity and pricing overview
- [Philodendron gloriosum Variegated](https://www.rareplantatlas.com/plants/philodendron-gloriosum-variegated-type-1): Ultra-rare terrestrial creeper, Type 1 vs Type 2 variegation analysis
- [Anthurium Delta Force](https://www.rareplantatlas.com/plants/anthurium-delta-force): Hybrid velvet anthurium, care guide, TC vs original stock
- [Alocasia Black Velvet Variegated Pink](https://www.rareplantatlas.com/plants/alocasia-black-velvet-variegated-pink): Jewel Alocasia, corm propagation, pink/white/gold forms
- [Glossary](https://www.rareplantatlas.com/glossary): Definitions of rare plant terminology

## Genus Index Pages

- [Philodendron](https://www.rareplantatlas.com/genus/philodendron)
- [Anthurium](https://www.rareplantatlas.com/genus/anthurium)
- [Alocasia](https://www.rareplantatlas.com/genus/alocasia)

## Topics Covered

- Rare plant care guides (light, humidity, substrate, watering, fertilizing)
- Variegation types and stability (chimeric, stable, sectoral, splash)
- Propagation methods (rhizome division, corm division, tissue culture, air layering)
- Price ranges and price history for collector plants
- Toxicity information for pets and humans
- Conservation status and ethical sourcing
- Tissue culture vs. wild-collected specimens

## Contact

Website: https://www.rareplantatlas.com
